prompt: A moody cinematic digital illustration of a tired young creator sitting alone at a cluttered desk in a dark room at night, seen in three-quarter side view, leaning forward with one elbow on the desk and one hand covering part of the face in an exhausted, overwhelmed pose. The face is intentionally obscured in shadow. The person wears dark casual clothes and a lanyard badge, suggesting a student, designer, or medical worker. The room feels realistic and slightly messy, with a desk lamp, papers, sketchbooks, mugs, stationery, and stacked books. On the left wall, include 2 illuminated X-ray films and a round wall clock, plus shelves and pinned notes in deep shadow. In front of the person is a glowing widescreen monitor showing an AI image generation or creative editing interface with a city-at-sunset artwork in the main preview and a row of thumbnail variations beneath it, modern dark UI, one purple action button. The monitor is the main light source, casting warm orange and cool blue highlights across the desk. Around the monitor and pouring out into the air, depict a vast surreal explosion of imagination and digital creativity: a swirling galaxy-like vortex with stars, nebula colors, spark particles, light trails, and cosmic dust in purple, blue, pink, and gold. Embed many floating dreamlike elements inside the swirl: a fantasy castle on a floating island with a tree, planets and moons, an astronaut, a film clapperboard, a video camera, musical notes, glowing silhouettes of people, a futuristic city skyline, a hot-air balloon, a car, birds, jellyfish-like luminous creatures, and multiple cats, including 1 giant sleeping orange tabby cat in the upper right and 1 cat in a space helmet near the lower right. The magical imagery should feel like thoughts escaping from the computer, beautiful but slightly dark and overwhelming, as if creativity, obsession, and emotional intensity are filling the room. Include a skeletal anatomy hand model standing beside the monitor on the right side of the desk, reinforcing an art-studio or study setting. Use dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, intricate detail, volumetric glow, cinematic depth, and a balance of realism and fantastical surrealism. The overall mood is melancholic, imaginative, and darkly inspiring, visualizing the feeling of being consumed by ideas generated through AI image generation.
